basics.product_tags: Casablanca sugar paste, white fondant 1 kg, cake decorating fondant, ready to roll sugar paste, cake covering paste, bakery decoration ingredient, fondant for cakes
basics.description:
Casablanca Sugar Paste (White) 1 Kg is a ready-to-roll sugar paste made for smooth cake covering, fondant work and decorative bakery finishing. Its white colour gives bakers a clean base for wedding cakes, celebration cakes, themed desserts and custom cake designs where a neat, polished surface is required.

The paste is suitable for rolling, shaping and coating cakes, and it can also be used for creating figures, flowers and 3D decorations. Its pliable texture supports detailed handwork, helping bakery teams manage both full cake coverage and smaller decorative elements with better control.

Casablanca Sugar Paste (White) 1 Kg is a practical choice for cake shops, home bakers, dessert counters and production kitchens that need a consistent white fondant format in a 1 kg pack for regular cake decoration work.
basics.short_description: Casablanca Sugar Paste (White) 1 Kg is a white ready-to-roll fondant for coating cakes, shaping decorations and creating neat bakery finishes. It works well for celebration cakes, theme cakes, fondant figures, flowers and decorative detailing where a smooth white base is needed. The 1 kg pack is useful for cake shops, pastry kitchens and bakeries handling daily decoration requirements.

basics.product_tags: Pillsbury Iris whip topping, whip topping 1 kg, cake icing topping, pastry decorating cream, whipped topping for cakes, dessert topping cream, bakery whip topping
basics.description:
Pillsbury Iris Whip Topping 1 Kg is a whip topping for cakes, pastries and dessert decoration where smooth texture and a glossy finish are important. It is suited for bakeries and pastry kitchens preparing iced cakes, display pastries, mousse-style desserts and decorated sweet counters.

The topping is designed to be thawed under chiller conditions before whipping. Once prepared, it can be used for icing, piping, borders, cake layers and decorative finishing. Its smooth mouthfeel and shiny appearance make it useful for everyday cake production as well as made-to-order dessert work.

Pillsbury Iris Whip Topping 1 Kg gives bakery teams a practical 1 kg format for controlled preparation, helping them manage whipping, decoration and finishing work across cakes and pastries.
basics.short_description: Pillsbury Iris Whip Topping 1 Kg is a bakery whip topping for icing, piping and decorating cakes, pastries and desserts. It is prepared by thawing under chiller conditions and whipping before use, making it suitable for smooth cake finishes, borders, layered desserts and display pastries. The 1 kg pack fits regular bakery, pastry counter and dessert production needs.

basics.product_tags: Purix glucose syrup, liquid glucose 1 kg, glucose syrup for bakery, confectionery glucose syrup, dessert glucose syrup, bakery syrup, sugar crystal control syrup
basics.description:
Purix Glucose Syrup 1 Kg is a liquid glucose syrup used in bakery, dessert and confectionery preparation. Its thick syrup form helps support texture control in sweets, fillings, candies, fudges and other recipes where sugar crystallisation needs to be managed during preparation.

This glucose syrup is useful for bakery kitchens working on dessert bases, confectionery items, caramel-style preparations and sweet components. It can be used as an ingredient in recipes that require smoothness, body and controlled sweetness without changing the workflow of regular production.

Purix Glucose Syrup 1 Kg is a practical pack for bakeries, dessert counters and food production kitchens that need liquid glucose in a manageable 1 kg quantity for routine recipe preparation.
basics.short_description: Purix Glucose Syrup 1 Kg is a liquid glucose syrup for bakery, dessert and confectionery applications. It is useful in recipes where sugar crystal formation needs to be controlled, especially in sweets, fudges, fillings, caramel-style preparations and dessert bases. The 1 kg pack suits bakeries, pastry kitchens and food production teams using glucose syrup in regular preparation.
